CVE-2021-45846.title: A flaw in the AMF parser of Slic3r libslic3r 1.3.0 allows an atta ...
CVE-2021-45846.description: A flaw in the AMF parser of Slic3r libslic3r 1.3.0 allows an attacker to cause an application crash using a crafted AMF document, where a metadata tag lacks a "type" attribute.

CVE-2021-45847.title: Several missing input validations in the 3MF parser component of  ...
CVE-2021-45847.description: Several missing input validations in the 3MF parser component of Slic3r libslic3r 1.3.0 can each allow an attacker to cause an application crash using a crafted 3MF input file.
